'''âf-l-p-v''' ('''kafalpevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cunnilingue|cunnilingue]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cunnilingue|cunnilingue]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-l-p-v
|-
! Lemma
| kafalpevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifalpevoko|thifalpevoko]] || [[word:jifalpevoko|jifalpevoko]] || [[word:shifalpevoko|shifalpevoko]] || [[word:kifalpevoko|kifalpevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufalpevoko|thuthufalpevoko]] || [[word:jujufalpevoko|jujufalpevoko]] || [[word:shushufalpevoko|shushufalpevoko]] || [[word:kukufalpevoko|kukufalpevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufalpevoko|thufalpevoko]] || [[word:jufalpevoko|jufalpevoko]] || [[word:shufalpevoko|shufalpevoko]] || [[word:kufalpevoko|kufalpevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufalpevoko|thufalpevoko]] || [[word:jufalpevoko|jufalpevoko]] || [[word:shufalpevoko|shufalpevoko]] || [[word:kufalpevoko|kufalpevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefalpevoko|thefalpevoko]] || [[word:jefalpevoko|jefalpevoko]] || [[word:shefalpevoko|shefalpevoko]] || [[word:kefalpevoko|kefalpevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofalpevoko|thothofalpevoko]] || [[word:jojofalpevoko|jojofalpevoko]] || [[word:shoshofalpevoko|shoshofalpevoko]] || [[word:kokofalpevoko|kokofalpevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofalpevoko|thofalpevoko]] || [[word:jofalpevoko|jofalpevoko]] || [[word:shofalpevoko|shofalpevoko]] || [[word:kofalpevoko|kofalpevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofalpevoko|thofalpevoko]] || [[word:jofalpevoko|jofalpevoko]] || [[word:shofalpevoko|shofalpevoko]] || [[word:kofalpevoko|kofalpevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfalpevoko|thĂŠfalpevoko]] || [[word:jĂŠfalpevoko|jĂŠfalpevoko]] || [[word:shĂŠfalpevoko|shĂŠfalpevoko]] || [[word:kĂŠfalpevoko|kĂŠfalpevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafalpevoko|thathafalpevoko]] || [[word:jajafalpevoko|jajafalpevoko]] || [[word:shashafalpevoko|shashafalpevoko]] || [[word:kakafalpevoko|kakafalpevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafalpevoko|thafalpevoko]] || [[word:jafalpevoko|jafalpevoko]] || [[word:shafalpevoko|shafalpevoko]] || [[word:kafalpevoko|kafalpevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafalpevoko|thafalpevoko]] || [[word:jafalpevoko|jafalpevoko]] || [[word:shafalpevoko|shafalpevoko]] || [[word:kafalpevoko|kafalpevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shafalpevithi|shafalpevithi]] || [[word:shafalpeviji|shafalpeviji]] || [[word:shafalpevishi|shafalpevishi]] || [[word:shafalpeviki|shafalpeviki]]
